Brick Blast is an engaging bricks and balls game with simple rules, a hint of challenge, and plenty of effortless fun. Pick your angle, shoot the balls, and watch them blast through every brick in their path.

Brick Blast delivers pure enjoyment with no rush or pressure. Play at your own pace and enjoy smooth, dynamic gameplay that will help you unwind while training your logic and focus.

How to Play Brick Blast:

The goal is simple: break the bricks and keep the board clear. Swipe to aim and release to shoot—the ball shooter sends glowing balls flying across the screen, bouncing off walls and smashing through colorful blocks. Plan your shots wisely to hit the best angles, clear multiple bricks at once, and watch the balls bounce out across the board in dazzling chains of glowing hits before the blocks reach the bottom line.

Discover power blocks that make this block breaker even more exciting:

• Laser shoots across rows or columns, damaging all blocks along its path.
• Multiplier triples your balls for massive combos.
• Redirect changes the path to reach tricky angles.
• Extra Ball gives you more power until the end of the round.

Use power blocks skillfully to enjoy mighty ball blasts and brick-breaking chain reactions.

Why You’ll Love Brick Blast:

• An easy-to-play brick breaker game with a modern look and smooth graphics.
• Dynamic levels packed with special blocks, combos, ball blasts, and glowing brick breaker effects.
• A calming pastime—no pressure, no time limits, just pure focus and pleasure.
• A fun way to unwind while honing your strategy skills—perfect for players who love puzzle quests and brick-breaking games.
• Endless ball breaker gameplay that keeps you coming back for more.

Take a break, play Brick Blast, and feel the joy of every perfect shot!

Takim – Njerëz Realë. Lidhje të Sinqerta.

Takim është një platformë moderne, e krijuar posaçërisht për komunitetin shqiptar, për t'ju ndihmuar të njohni njerëz realë dhe të ndërtoni lidhje të sinqerta. 

Ne fokusohemi te origjinaliteti, thjeshtësia dhe siguria – që ju të shpenzoni më pak kohë duke kërkuar dhe më shumë kohë duke u lidhur.
Pavarësisht nëse po kërkoni të njohni dikë të ri, të nisni një bisedë interesante apo të ndërtoni diçka kuptimplotë, Takim e bën këtë proces të lehtë dhe të sigurt.

Pse Takim?
1. Profile Autentike
2. Besë & Siguri – Një sistem unik besimi i ndërtuar mbi vlerat e komunitetit tonë.
3. Ftesë për Kafe – Kaloni nga bisedat online në takime reale me funksionin tonë unik të ftesave.
4. Fokus Lokal, Vizion Global – Fillojmë në Shqipëri, me vizionin për t'u shtrirë kudo ku ka shqiptarë.

Si funksionon?
1. Krijoni profilin tuaj brenda pak minutave.
2. Zbuloni njerëz përmes rrjedhës së profileve (feed).
3. Përdorni "Kave?" për të ftuar dikë në një takim real ose nisni bisedën direkt.

Siguria dhe Besimi:

Takim është ndërtuar mbi respektin dhe sigurinë. Sistemet tona të raportimit dhe mjetet e moderimit ndihmojnë në krijimin e një mjedisi të besueshëm për të gjithë.

Takim Premium & Abonimet:

Takim është një aplikacion falas për t'u përdorur, por ofron edhe paketa opsionale abonimi si Takim Premium. Kaloni në Takim Premium për të zhbllokuar veçori shtesë, duke përfshirë:
1. Dukshmëri të shtuar të profilit.
2. Opsione të avancuara kërkimi.
3. Mjete shtesë për t'u lidhur më shpejt.

(Vini re: Disa veçori si Highlight, ose shikimi i atyre që ju kanë pëlqyer, mund të kërkojnë abonim. Disponueshmëria e veçorive mund të ndryshojë sipas rajonit.)

Privatësia juaj ka rëndësi

Ne e marrim privatësinë tuaj shumë seriozisht. Të dhënat tuaja trajtohen me siguri dhe përdoren vetëm për të përmirësuar përvojën tuaj në aplikacion. Ju jeni gjithmonë në kontroll të informacionit tuaj.

Your life deserves more than disappearing posts and scattered notes.


ThingsBook is a new kind of personal platform built for people who love to write, reflect, and collect the moments that make up their lives. It’s where long-form storytelling meets beautiful organization, giving you a space to capture what you did, how you felt, and what you care about in lasting detail.


Whether you are journaling about your day, writing thoughtful reflections, or collecting the books you love, the meals you cooked, the trips you took, or the ideas that moved you, ThingsBook helps you turn everyday life into something meaningful and permanent.

Write freely
At its core, ThingsBook is about writing. Real writing. Long-form, text-centric storytelling that lets you express yourself without character limits or performance pressure. Capture your thoughts, routines, memories, and observations in a way that feels natural, personal, and deeply yours.


Collect what matters
Organize everything you write into beautiful, structured collections. Your books, travels, meals, fashion finds, hobbies, goals, and ideas all live together in one place. Think of it as your personal digital shelf, always there when you want to revisit your life.

Build your archive
ThingsBook is not about fleeting trends or posts that disappear. Your writing and collections become a lasting personal archive, a living record of who you are and what you love. Over time, your ThingsBook becomes your story.

Share on your terms
Share publicly, with friends, or keep things private. Post whenever inspiration hits. Take breaks whenever you need. Your space never goes stale, and there is no pressure to perform.

Designed for everyday life
You do not need special skills, perfect photos, or big moments. ThingsBook is built for real life. Write about your morning coffee, the song you cannot stop playing, the trip that changed you, the book that stayed with you, the place that always feels like home.

Smart tools that support your writing
Helpful prompts, thoughtful organization, search, and location features make it easier to document your life as it happens, without turning your thoughts into work.

Your corner of the internet
ThingsBook is where your interests, ideas, and experiences come together. Not a feed to chase. A space to build.

Write your life.
Collect your world.
Remember what matters.
